name: Seafood Cocktail Sauce 2
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Lemon juice (or up to 4 tablespoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
3. Taste the mixture and add salt as desired.
4. Transfer the sauce to a container and chill until ready to serve.
